rationale: Section 26.175 governs a property tax database locator website. It references no exemption dollar amounts and is unaffected by changing the homestead exemption figure in §11.13(b).
quote: "property tax database" means a property tax database required to be created and maintained by a chief appraiser under Section 26.17.
_note: No conflict; §26.175 is procedural/IT infrastructure and does not reference §11.13(b) exemption amounts.
